src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Rename servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Replace concatenated string literals for HTML generation with Java 15+ text blocks for better readability.
Switch from manual log message to Log4j 2's entry/exit logging method.
Add Javadoc comment describing the purpose of the Timer servlet.
Update the generated HTML to include a navigation bar and correct the title.
Rename javax.servlet imports to jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
Add a license/copyright header block to the source file.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.human_impl:
/*
 * Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - Servlet
 * 
 * https://github.com/egalli64/jees
 */

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Add a Javadoc comment describing the purpose of the servlet class.
Replace manual log message with Log4j 2 entry/exit logging method.
Add inline comments to explain the steps of the HTTP response generation.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.human_impl: // 1. prepare the response, setting its type and encoding

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Users.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Add Log4j2 dependency for structured logging capabilities.
Rename the User data class from com.example.jees.dao.User to com.example.jees.bean.User to reflect better architectural layering.
Wrap PrintWriter in a try-with-resources block to ensure proper resource closure, although response writers are typically managed by the container.
Integrate Log4j2 logger to trace method entry for debugging and monitoring purposes.
Add JavaDoc and inline comments to explain the servlet's purpose and the steps involved in generating the JSON response.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Rename javax.servlet imports to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by the target environment.
Integrate Log4j2 for application logging capabilities.
Add class-level documentation describing the servlet's purpose.
Switch the servlet endpoint from handling POST requests to handling GET requests.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.human_impl: protected void doGet(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response)

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Replace password-based validation with session-based user storage and remove password parameter handling.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.human_impl:
HttpSession session = request.getSession();
session.setAttribute("user", user == null || user.isBlank() ? "unknown" : user);

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s06/Login.general_idea: Standardize the forward destination to a single home page instead of conditional JSPs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api version 6.0.0 to align with Jakarta EE 10 / Tomcat 10.1.
Replace javax.servlet jstl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api version 3.0.0.
Replace taglibs-standard-impl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl implementation version 3.0.1.
Update Gson dependency from version 2.9.0 to 2.10.
Update Log4j Core dependency from version 2.17.2 to 2.22.1.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add DBeaver IDE configuration directory to gitignore to prevent committing local database connection settings.
Add Eclipse factory path configuration file to gitignore to exclude local build path settings.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project title from 'jees' to 'Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - Servlet' to reflect the migration from Java EE to Jakarta EE.
README.md.human_impl:
- # jees
+ ## Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - Servlet

README.md.general_idea: Update the introduction text to specify the new technology stack (Tomcat 10.1, Maven 3, Eclipse) replacing the generic Java EE description.
README.md.human_impl:
- Introduction to Java EE on a Web Server
+ ### Used technologies
+ - Apache Tomcat 10.1
+ - Maven 3

README.md.general_idea: Remove the reference to Tomcat 9 and implicitly update the context to Tomcat 10.1 as indicated in the new tech stack section.
Add documentation regarding the assumed PostgreSQL JDBC resource setup, including links to helper projects and configuration details.
README.md.human_impl:
+ ### As JDBC resource, access to PostgreSQL is assumed
+ - _Almost any other RDBMS should do_
+ - For setup see [hron](https://github.com/egalli64/hron)

src/main/webapp/META-INF/context.xml.general_idea: Rename JDBC resource names from 'me' to 'hron' to align with the new project branding.
Update database usernames and passwords in commented-out resource definitions to match the new schema.
Update JDBC connection URLs to point to the 'hron' database/schema instead of 'me'.
Add a commented-out PostgreSQL DataSource configuration example.
Update header comments to reflect the new project name and repository link.
src/main/webapp/META-INF/context.xml.human_impl: Added <!-- Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - Servlet --> and GitHub link

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Migrate web.xml namespace from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE to support Tomcat 10+ and Jakarta EE 9+.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed xmlns from 'http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee' to 'https://jakarta.ee/xml/ns/jakartaee' and updated schema location.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Servlet specification version from 4.0 to 6.0 to align with Jakarta EE 10/Tomcat 10.1.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed version attribute from '4.0' to '6.0' and updated schema location to web-app_6_0.xsd.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Add session timeout configuration to enforce session expiration after 10 minutes.
Update resource reference to use the new JDBC data source name 'jdbc/hron'.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update admin context parameter value to a more specific name.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Replace sensitive password context parameter with a non-sensitive birthday parameter.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Remove custom error page mappings for 404 and 500 errors.

Add lang='en' attribute to the html tag for better accessibility and standards compliance.

Update specific hyperlink hrefs to point to new resource paths (e.g., s02/ajax.html, s03/paramReader.html).
Remove links to examples that have been moved to other projects or are no longer part of this specific module.
